query: SELECT COLUMN_NAME, DATA_TYPE FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'users' AND TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE() ORDER BY ORDINAL_POSITION;
